hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q '/packages/'; then changeset_files=$(git diff --name-only main -- '.changeset/*.md' 2>/dev/null | grep -v README.md); if [ -z "$changeset_files" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You edited a file under packages/ but there is no changeset file yet on this branch. Before finishing, create a changeset in .changeset/ (YAML frontmatter with package name + bump type, then a description)."}}'; fi; fi; }
